knowledge_gaps: 2Y-SPX correlation is -0.25 to -0.35 while 30Y-SPX is +0.05 to +0.15, reflecting monetary dominance at front end and fiscal supply dominance at long end
Fiscal austerity that eliminates biofuel tax credits while preserving volume mandates creates market distortions
The Fama-French HML factor has ~1-2% incremental annual return attributable to fiscal policy after controlling for cycle and monetary policy
G7 fiscal multiplier estimates under current debt levels
A U.S. sovereign credit downgrade below AA would trigger forced selling and collateral substitution through Basel III risk weighting, central bank repo eligibility, and insurance capital requirements
Under fiscal dominance, stock-bond correlation flips positive, duration becomes risk factor, and quality factor premium expands 2-3x
Equity-implied HY spreads are 50-75bp wider than actual spreads, reflecting differential fiscal optimism between credit and equity investors
Fiscal multipliers are overstated when food prices are elevated due to import leakage
Fiscal contraction has an asymmetrically higher multiplier (1.2-1.8x) than fiscal expansion (0.6-0.9x) at current debt levels
IRA rollback under DOGE would remove 800kt-1.2Mt of incremental copper demand from 2028-2032 balance sheets
Interaction between fiscal deficits and term premium
focus.instruction: Build foundational understanding: define core concepts, establish theoretical frameworks, identify key empirical patterns, and map connections to related topics.
